There are several Pecan trees in the Green Valley Nature Preserve and Prairie Restoration site in Moline.  Enter the preserve from 55th Avenue.  You will have to park your car and cross a foot bridge.  The pecan trees can be found near the river on your left s
Several around library, including on the median behind the library by the book drop. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-June.

6 Juneberry/Serviceberry plants along the sidewalk at the entrance to the Moline Public Library.  There are also Juneberry plants in the medians around the parking lot.  The delicious berries are ripe in early June. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-J
